mapper.select: SELECT RULE_ID AS ruleId, USER_ID AS userId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, REMIND_TIME AS remindTime, ENABLED AS enabled, RULE_SOURCE AS ruleSource, INTERVENTION_ID AS interventionId, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_RULES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND (RULE_SOURCE = 'user' OR EXPIRES_AT IS NULL OR EXPIRES_AT > NOW()) ORDER BY CHECKIN_TYPE, SORT_ORDER, REMIND_TIME
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_RULES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RULE_SOURCE = #{ruleSource}
mapper.select: SELECT RULE_ID AS ruleId, USER_ID AS userId, CHECKIN_TYPE AS checkinType, REMIND_TIME AS remindTime, ENABLED AS enabled, RULE_SOURCE AS ruleSource, INTERVENTION_ID AS interventionId, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CHECKIN_REMINDER_RULES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND CHECKIN_TYPE = #{checkinType} AND REMIND_TIME = #{remindTime} AND RULE_SOURCE = 'user' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHECKIN_REMINDER_RULES ( RULE_ID, USER_ID, CHECKIN_TYPE, REMIND_TIME, ENABLED, RULE_SOURCE, INTERVENTION_ID, EXPIRES_AT, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{userId}, #{checkinType}, #{remindTime}, #{enabled}, #{ruleSource}, #{interventionId}, #{expiresAt}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW() )
